questions.question: Explain Docker Containers Core Principles Part 2A and its primary use case in Docker Containers.
questions.answer: Docker Containers Core Principles Part 2A provides a structured mechanism to handle core application logic cleanly.

questions.question: What are common mistakes developers make with Docker Containers Core Principles Part 2A?
questions.answer: Common issues include scoping errors, unhandled boundary cases, and improper resource cleanup.

questions.question: How does the Docker Containers runtime optimize Docker Containers Core Principles Part 2A under the hood?
questions.answer: The runtime engine uses symbol tables, call stack frames, and bytecode optimization to run instructions efficiently.
